name: magic ball
short_description: "Magic Ball" is a casual game where the ball is the main character, and you need to hit the ball into the hole.
detailed_description:
Gameplay Introduction:

In the given time, click to adjust the angle and strength of the ball's launch, then shoot the ball into the hole to pass the level. The game will also record your highest completion record.

Game Features:

  • The controls are simple, but the difficulty is high. The strength of the ball’s launch is very important.

  • Over 20 maps in total.

  • 5 different styles of balls, each with its own unique physics system. For example, a basketball is heavier than a rubber ball and experiences greater gravity. The strength of the launch will vary accordingly.

  • Spend in-game coins to unlock new backgrounds and new balls.

  • A realistic physics system.
